#  Subscribe to the Drawings Log 
##  Background 
You may want to subscribe yourself or other users to the project's drawings log if these users would benefit from receiving update emails when new revisions are added to the project's Drawings tool. Emails will be sent out to notify you of the following items when an Admin publishes and distributes new drawings:
  * New drawing sets
  * New drawing revisions
  * New drawing sketches


Admin users will have the option to publish new drawings or revisions, or publish and distribute, which will send an email immediately to all subscribers. Emails will be sent out automatically once an hour if new sketches are added in that hour. You will not get an email if no items were added to the drawings tool.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' permissions to add people to the subscription list.
    * 'Read Only' or above permissions to subscribe to the Drawings log.


##  Steps 
  * Subscribe Yourself
  * Subscribe Members of your Team


### Subscribe Yourself
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Next to 'Subscribe', move the toggle ![Icon Toggle On](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5432baecee81bc2745e77688cd124644/7b30429a4c1524f8ad61245b0caddc16/icon-toggle-on.png?fm=webp&h=16) to the ON position.![Clipboard E07bec856d4cd5e330df95491a7f1a3e7](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e175bbbaf9acae541cb20cb253a3b8c8/8537e92de3e80dc5d2e7fb6766c36ee5/clipboard_e07bec856d4cd5e330df95491a7f1a3e7.png?fm=webp)


### Subscribe Members of your Team
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click the **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. In the Drawing Log Settings page under "General Settings," click the drop-down menu under **Drawing Log Subscribers**.
  4. Add users who should be subscribed to your Drawings page.  
_Note :_ If you add a group to the drawing log subscribers, any additions or subtractions to the group will not be reflected in this list. For example, if you add a person to an "Internal" group in the Directory, that person will not be added to the drawing log subscribers to reflect the group change.
  5. Click **Update** at the bottom of the page to save your settings.


## See Also
  * [Unsubscribe from the Drawings Log](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/unsubscribe-from-the-drawings-log)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
title: Subscribe to the Drawings Log
description: How to subscribe yourself and others to the drawings in the project's Drawings log.
